rules.description: prompt_seed from actor card must be used for every image in the campaign
outfit_id must remain identical within a single campaign unless shot_type is 'before-after' or explicitly flagged as outfit-change
All distinguishing_marks from actor card must appear in Layer 1 of every shot
Camera profile should remain consistent within a scene — switching profiles requires a new scene declaration
rules.enforcement: soft — warning on violation, not block

rules.description: time_of_day and ambient light must be consistent within a scene group
All 10 realism anchors must appear in every prompt — no partial injection
rules.enforcement: hard — partial realism injection invalidates prompt

rules.description: actor.negative_anchors must be merged with global_negatives in every Layer 6 — never dropped

multi_shot_checklist: camera profile declared for each shot
Layer 6 includes both global and actor negatives
video motion prompts use motion-only descriptors
